cookies.title: Cookie settings
cookies.description: We use Google Analytics to understand how our users find the cheapest gas. No personal data is stored.

notifications.title: 🔔 Alerts
notifications.enabled_desc: You'll be notified when prices drop significantly
notifications.denied_desc: Enable in browser settings to receive price alerts
notifications.prompt_desc: Receive notifications when fuel prices drop below your threshold

loading.funny_1: If this gets killed, my free plan is toast... 🍞
loading.funny_2: Houston, we have a problem... the free tier is at 99%. 🚀
loading.funny_3: One does not simply fetch prices without hitting the daily limit. 🏔️
loading.funny_4: Help me, Firebase Admin... you're my only hope (to stay free). 💫
loading.funny_5: I'm going to make him an offer he can't refuse... 50,000 free reads. 🤌
loading.funny_6: I feel the need... the need for more free quota! 🏎️
loading.funny_7: Mama always said Firebase was like a box of chocolates... you never know when you run out. 🍬
loading.funny_8: You can't handle the truth! (And neither can our daily limit). ⚖️
loading.funny_9: I've seen things you people wouldn't believe... like our usage bills. 🌌
loading.funny_10: Are you not entertained?! Is this not why we are out of quota?! ⚔️
loading.funny_11: Great Scott! The user count is over 1.21 gigawatts! 🏎️💨
loading.funny_12: Frankly, my dear, I don't give a... wait, we hit the read limit?! 😱
